name: Status Adornment
description: Compact validation status glyph used as an adornment for form-related controls, mapped from semantic icon provider status-adornment icons.

status.description: Validation status to display. In practice maps to adornment variants for `error`, `warning`, and `success`.

className.description: Additional class names applied to the icon root.

aria-label.description: Accessible label on the rendered icon; component defaults this to the `status` value.

aria: Rendered adornment icon receives `aria-label` set to status
Use alongside contextual text/field semantics; icon alone should not carry all validation meaning
